# MLS Next Schedule Filtering Application

Vite + React + TypeScript project for an MLS Next schedule filtering application with responsive mobile-first design.

## Project Features
- Browse by division/region navigation flow
- Search by team navigation flow
- Responsive mobile-first design
- Backend API integration
- TypeScript for type safety
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Axios for HTTP requests

## Development
- Development server: `npm run dev`
- Build: `npm run build`
- Preview: `npm run preview`
- Lint: `npm run lint`

## Architecture
- `/src/pages` - Main page components
- `/src/components` - Reusable UI components
- `/src/services` - API integration and backend communication
- `/src/types` - TypeScript type definitions
- `/src/styles` - Global styles and Tailwind configuration
- `/src/hooks` - Custom React hooks
- `/src/utils` - Utility functions and helpers
